outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources is facing a challenging quarter with a significant reduction in drilling activity, as indicated by a relative activity delta of -0.5 and only 7 active sites, which is below the historical average. The average WTI price of approximately $55.63 per barrel, combined with a realized price differential of 0.92, suggests that revenue will be constrained. Our deterministic forecast of $234.53 million reflects these headwinds, as the company navigates a period of reduced operational momentum.
